MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-06-2013 IN 206, PLAINTIFF WENDY LEUNG'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 8/5/2013 IS CONTINUED TO 1/27/2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
